results.label: Standard — home renovation DIY channel
results.output_summary: Persona: 'Jake, the Cautious First-Timer.' Describes a late-20s first-time homeowner who researches extensively before starting any project because mistakes cost real money. All five dimensions present and distinct. Content implications: (1) always include a cost breakdown, (2) front-load the difficulty assessment so Jake can decide if this is a DIY or contractor job before investing 15 minutes, (3) create a 'before you start' checklist format — Jake will not begin a project without confirming he has everything.

A1.note: Named persona with all five sections distinct and well-developed.

A2.note: Three numbered implications, all actionable and specific to this channel.

A3.note: Persona is specific ('researches for three days before buying a $40 tool') and clearly derived from the 'how much did this cost' comment pattern.

results.label: Minimal — only required fields
results.output_summary: Persona: 'Sarah, the Late Bloomer.' A woman in her 40s who always wanted to paint but was told she wasn't artistic. All five dimensions present. Trust section: values when the host shows their own early bad work. Avoidance: disengages from content that assumes prior art education. Content implications specific to the channel despite minimal input.

A1.note: All five sections present and distinct.

A2.note: Three specific implications derived from the persona.

A3.note: Persona is specific to the channel input. 'Late Bloomer' archetype fits the comment patterns provided.

results.label: European context — sustainable fashion channel
results.output_summary: Persona: 'Lena, the Conscious Curator.' A Stockholm-based professional in her late 20s who cycles to work and brings a tote bag to the thrift store. European context deeply integrated — references Scandinavian design sensibility, EUR pricing, European thrift store culture. Trust section: trusts channels that call out greenwashing by name. Avoidance: disengages from haul culture and overconsumption framing. Content implications include testing city-specific thrift guides for different European capitals.

A1.note: All five sections present. European cultural context woven throughout.

A2.note: Implications include European-specific strategy like city-specific guides.

A3.note: Persona is specific to Swedish/European sustainable fashion culture and derived from input.
